meta.description: ARCHIVE: All completed tasks from the 3d-builder project. Moved out of main kanban.json to keep the active board focused and useful.

tasks.title: Initialize Vite + React + TypeScript project
tasks.description: Use `npm create vite@latest . -- --template react-ts --yes`. Configure strict TS, HMR, and prepare for three.js + R3F imports.

tasks.title: Install core dependencies (three + R3F + state + UI)
tasks.description: three, @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei, zustand, lucide-react, @types/three, tailwindcss + postcss/autoprefixer. Prepare for pro quality declarative 3D + React UI.

tasks.title: Setup Tailwind v4 + clean dark pro theme
tasks.description: Add @import "tailwindcss"; Create Lego-inspired palette (red #e30613, yellow, blue). Fullscreen layout, panels, HUD.

tasks.title: Create basic fullscreen layout + stub panels
tasks.description: Topbar, left palette stub, right inspector stub, bottom statusbar, help overlay. All keyboard accessible.

tasks.title: Add @react-three/fiber Canvas + basic scene
tasks.description: Integrate <Canvas>, camera, lights (ambient + directional), basic ground. Target 60fps.

tasks.title: Add OrbitControls + high-quality Grid from drei
tasks.description: Use <OrbitControls enableDamping ... /> and <Grid infiniteGrid cellSize={1} />. God POV ready.
acceptance: Smooth orbit + zoom + pan with mouse

tasks.title: Define TypeScript types: PartDef, PlacedPiece, CursorState
tasks.description: Create src/types.ts with strict interfaces for the entire model.

tasks.title: Create zustand store (pieces, cursor, history, selection)
tasks.description: Single source of truth. Include basic undo stack (array of snapshots).

tasks.title: Implement piece catalog (20+ core parts)
tasks.description: src/lib/pieceCatalog.ts with id, name, w, l, h (plates), hasStuds, category. Use real Lego naming.

tasks.title: Build procedural geometry factory for basic bricks
tasks.description: createBrickGeometry({w, l, h}): BufferGeometry or Group. Accurate studs using Cylinder + Box with real proportions (stud=1, plateH≈0.4, brick≈1.2).

tasks.title: Create reusable <LegoPiece /> R3F component
tasks.description: Accepts PlacedPiece props. Use memoized geometries per type+color. Support shadows.

tasks.title: Implement build cursor + snapping math (snapUtils)
tasks.description: Cursor always on integer studs (X/Z) + discrete plate heights (Y). Functions: snapToGrid, getFootprint, layerToY.

tasks.title: Keyboard primary controls: cursor movement + layer + rotate
tasks.description: Central keyboard.ts or hook. Arrow/WASD move, [ ] layer, R rotate. Prevent conflicts with OrbitControls.
acceptance: Pure keyboard can move ghost and change layer/rotation smoothly

tasks.title: Placement + validity (collision via stud occupancy)
tasks.description: Maintain stud-level occupancy map. Prevent overlaps. Show green/red validity on ghost.

tasks.title: Place / delete actions wired to store
tasks.description: Space/Enter places current type at cursor. Delete removes under cursor or selected.

tasks.title: Render placed pieces from store using instancing or groups
tasks.description: Efficient path: group pieces by (type, color) and use <instancedMesh> where possible.

tasks.title: Add selection system (click + keyboard S)
tasks.description: Raycast on click or cursor position. Highlight selected. Inspector shows live data.

tasks.title: Color system + authentic Lego palette swatches
tasks.description: Hardcode ~35-40 colors with names. Keyboard + mouse selectable. Live update on selected or ghost.
references: BrickLink color guide or common community hex lists

tasks.title: LocalStorage autosave + manual Save / Load JSON
tasks.description: Serialize full state (pieces + camera target + current settings). Validate on load.

tasks.title: GLTF export of entire build
tasks.description: Use GLTFExporter to export current scene or reconstructed group as downloadable .glb.

tasks.title: Undo / Redo stack (deep history)
tasks.description: Push full pieces snapshots on mutations. Ctrl+Z / Y. Bounded size (e.g. 50).

tasks.title: Expand catalog: add plates, tiles, slopes, rounds (reach 25+)
tasks.description: Extend geometry factory + catalog. Test stacking and rotation.
references: Lego part geometry references + previous bartneck article

tasks.title: Pristine nostalgic LEGO plastic materials + lighting
tasks.description: Upgrade to high-quality plastic look: MeshPhysicalMaterial (or advanced Phong) with proper roughness, specular, clearcoat-like sheen for ABS plastic. Joyful but tasteful lighting (balanced directional + hemi + soft fill, not dark). Achieve the specific clean, premium look of classic LEGO Digital Designer and early LEGO games. Avoid oversaturated or generic PBR.
references: LEGO Digital Designer rendering style references + classic LEGO game plastic shading

tasks.title: Status bar + live cursor / stats display
tasks.description: Always show: cursor studs coords, current piece+color, piece count, layer, validity.
